strategy: Attack Bellosh at least once every round — if he isn't hit each round he cheat-casts Ra (635-715) the next round. Even a small chip hit prevents it.
Hit with Myth, Life, or Death (+25% incoming); never attack into Balance (80% resist).
He's stunable and beguilable — stun him to shut down a threatened Ra while you set up.
Clear the Condemned Mander, Pit Viper, and Ravenous Tooth minions with an AoE while chipping him.
Blade and Feint, keep the once-per-round chip going, then land a big Myth/Life/Death hit.
cheatNotes: Attack Bellosh at least once every round or he answers with Ra (635-715) next round — even a small chip hit prevents it, and he's stunnable if you need to shut him down.
